Fields.Name: Menu Resource ID
Fields.Description: ID of the resource to use.

Fields.Name: Open SE ID
Fields.Description: SE to play when the tutorial opens

Fields.Name: Close SE ID
Fields.Description: SE to play when the tutorial closes

Fields.Name: Repeat Type
Fields.Description: Determines whether or not the tutorial can replay

Fields.Name: Multi-Response
Fields.Description: Whether to allow multiple simultaneous response displays

Fields.Name: Display Event Flag
Fields.Description: Event flag ID for display permission. Will not be displayed until the specified event flag is set (0: Always allowed)
